title: Sweet Creamy Bhuna Eggplant Stir-Fry
description: This sweet and creamy Venezuelan dish features eggplants cooked in a flavorful sauce with bhuna spices. Gluten-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup heavy cream or dairy-free cream alternative

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Slice eggplants into rounds about 1/8-inch thick.
Arrange eggplant slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, sprinkle with salt and drizzle lightly with olive oil. Bake for 30 minutes or until tender but not mushy.
Meanwhile, in a large skillet over medium heat, sauté minced garlic and onion until fragrant and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add eggplant slices to the skillet; pour fresh lime juice over them, tossing gently to coat. Cook for another minute to remove any excess moisture from the pan.
In a small bowl, mix together heavy cream or dairy-free cream alternative, brown sugar, and salt. Pour this mixture into the skillet with the cooked eggplants, stirring well until heated through.
Serve hot with fresh cilantro if desired. Garnish with additional lime wedges for added freshness.
